title: rubus lettii
intro: Rubus lettii, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the Himalayas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rubus lettii include its ability to help lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Rubus lettii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and prevent various health conditions.
